svg.title: Arm C graph (cumulative)
svg.desc: Arm B graph (isolate, gene SNPs, pathways with gene-pathway and isolate-pathway edges) extended with a KO node bridging a pathway-orphan gene to a pathway.
svg.text: Arm C: KO extension (cumulative on Arm B)
Carries all Arm B edges; adds KO node with gene–KO and KO–pathway links
N³ᵢ is pathway-orphan: it has no direct gene–pwy edge, but reaches P¹ through the KO bridge.
